title: 8.04.2022 – Erasmus+ Writen Exam Announcement
content:
Duyurular

Detay

8.04.2022 – Erasmus+ Writen Exam Announcement

Dear Students,

2021-2022 Spring Term Erasmus+ 2022 Project Written part of the Exam will be administered on Dudullu campus on

Friday, February 8, 2022

.

2021-2022 Spring Term Erasmus+ 2022 Project Speaking part of the Exam will be administered online on

Friday, April 15, 2022

on MS Teams

(You need to download MS Teams on your computer and sign in as you sign in to your Dogus University mail accounts.)

The exam consists of

two parts

and the students are required to attend both parts.

08.04.2022 Written Exam (75%): 15:00 - 16:15 (Duration: 75 minutes)

15.04.2022 Speaking Exam (25%): 15:00 – 19:00 (Duration: max 10 minutes for each student)

The face to face Written Exam will be administered at 15:00 on Dudullu campus.

All students must take the written exam in classrooms, where they were placed,

at 15:00

on

. Students must have a valid ID with photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license), a blue pen, a pencil and an eraser during the exam.

For the Speaking Exam

, check

Erasmus+

Speaking Exam Appointment Lists that will be announced

on the university’s website on April 12, 2022.

You need to be online on MS Teams within the slot you were allotted to.

Be ready and wait for the examiner’s call on MS Teams anytime during the specified slot which is written next to your student number on the speaking exam appointment lists.

Students who have problems with their computers can also take the exam on their mobile phones by downloading MS Teams application on their mobile phones. To summarize, be online on MS Teams within the given time and wait for the examiner’s call.

If you have any questions regarding the exam itself, you may email the Foreign Languages Unit at

[email protected]

For your other queries about Erasmus+ in general, you may contact the Erasmus+ Office at

[email protected]

Good Luck!

Paylaş
